evidence_summary: Establish the grandeur of Glinda's castle through architectural scale and formal guard presence. The travelers transition from weary wanderers to guests under official supervision, moving from the red-themed exterior into the castle interior.
Following directions, the travelers arrive at Glinda's castle. They are met by guards in red uniforms who grant them immediate access to see the Good Witch.
Travelers emerge into view of the massive red-themed architecture.
Travelers follow guards through the threshold into the interior.
The group arrives at the gates and is granted immediate access by the guards.
